title: bertiera iturensis
intro: Bertiera iturensis, also known as the Iturensis tree or the African yellow-wood, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is a tree native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Bertiera iturensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and malaria, as well as providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine in West and Central Africa.
